name: Acorn Squash Soup W/Corned Beef & Walnuts
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs Acorn Squash, Peeled, Seeded and Cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the corned beef with water and seasonings until tender. Remove from the broth.
2. Trim off any excess fat from the broth. Add the cubed squash. Cook until tender. Cool.
3. Use a food processor to puree the mixture. Add the cream and horseradish. Season to taste.
4. Add the cubed corned beef, toasted walnuts, and snipped chives immediately before serving.
